title: Quant
body:
Modpack for a comfortable game on the server Quant!

### Performance
There are all mods to optimize your Minecraft - from Sodium to ParticleCore.

### Interaction with players
Plasmovoice and emotecraft will always come to your aid if you want to express your feelings with words or emotions! Or you can just tag your friends in the tab for quick search.

### Quality of Life
The following mods are for your perception of the world, where you can click through frames, read or write your personal diary. Next are visual and sound effects, without which you will no longer imagine your game of Minecraft. Changing the skin while in the game or on the server is enclosed😉

### Small changes
If you were worried about the constant rain in front of your screen, it is no longer a problem, because the collection has ParticleRain and many other mods that will fix a variety of visual shortcomings.

### Config
Settings based on player preferences have been added so that you are not bothered by unnecessary customization of mods.
